creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Thibault Jouan from comment #59)
That list hightlighted that I was testing on an older ports tree.  After a git pull, I have patch issues:

Patching file textproc/rubygem-html2text/files/patch-gemspec using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|diff --git textproc/rubygem-nokogiri/files/patch-gemspec textproc/rubygem-nokogiri/files/patch-gemspec
|index 43f56f9a0877..f4885e236892 100644
|--- textproc/rubygem-nokogiri/files/patch-gemspec
|+++ textproc/rubygem-nokogiri/files/patch-gemspec
--------------------------
File to patch: 

That is the only issue.
